item.title: Tic Tac Toe
item.description: Play Tic Tac Toe also, know as Noughts and Crosses on your Android phone. A simple version for everyone, and it’s completely free. The best way to pass your time. Tic ac Toe is an AI puzzle game which is the best way to train your brain.

item.title: Chat Room.
item.description:
• Implemented an Android chat application using Firebase.

• Integrated the latest Firebase’s, Cloud Firestore for the database.

• Also, added Firebase authentication to validate users.

Future release : Video calling feature.

item.title: Text to image synthesis.
item.description:
• Implementated a model for synthesizing images for text description using the GAN-CLS algorithm.

• Implementation is built on top of a DCGAN in PyTorch.

• The text descriptions were encoded using the CNN-RNN model and the DCGAN is trained on those text features.

Dataset Source: Caltech - UCSD Birds 200-2011
